Description: Upon activation the unit receives a temporary magic bubble providing protection against one negative effect and increases the unit's damage. If this unit is merged the bubble will be passed on to neighboring units. Destruction of the bubble will yield mana.
Observable Signatures: Unit gains glowing bubble visual on cast; bubble passes to neighbors on merge; mana gained on bubble pop

Description: When a unit receives a bubble it has a certain chance of removing negative effects and destroying the bubble. In addition periodically a unit that receives a negative effect will be cleared of it and receive a bubble. 80-pt bonus: Dispelling or canceling a negative effect with this ability increases the amount of mana received from any source for 10s (triggers once every 40s at most).
A unit in a bubble will increase its attack speed. 80-pt bonus: Units have a chance of appearing with a bubble but this bubble has reduced duration.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: In Progress

Description: A unit in a bubble will have an increased chance of dealing a critical attack. Critical damage from units in a bubble will be increased.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: In Progress

Description: After activating an ability there is some chance of obtaining a partial restoration of the Hero Ability but this effect will only be able to be activated again after a certain amount of time. (Cooldown: 60%; Chance of charging: 25%; Activation interval: 20s)
Observable Signatures: Passive recharge visual on hero portrait after ability use

Description: Freezes monsters dealing ability damage and additional damage based on their current health; this health-based damage is reduced for bosses and mini bosses. In PvP mode also freezes enemy units while in Co-Op and single player modes temporarily makes the player's units more powerful. Each unit frozen or empowered gives an Iceshard Charge that increases the damage dealt with the Winter's Kiss ability.
Observable Signatures: Freeze visual on enemy units; Iceshard counter visible on hero; enemy units visibly slowed/stopped

Description: Creates Snowflake tiles on the player's field. When merging units in a Snowflake tile launches a Snowball at a random enemy unit and gives an Iceshard Charge. A unit hit with a Snowball will be frozen by the Winter's Kiss ability. Snowflake tiles are moved at the end of the boss phase and after the ability has been activated.
Observable Signatures: Snowflake tile markers on board; snowball projectile animation on merge

Description: When a boss or mini boss appears there is a chance of all the monsters on the player's path being slowed down. There is a small chance of it being triggered when an ordinary monster appears. After the enemy unit has been frozen its attack speed is temporarily reduced in PvP or increased in Co-Op and single player modes. 80-pt bonus: Monsters slowed with this ability receive increased critical damage.
Stat 1 Name: Chance of slowing a boss or mini boss
Stat 4 Name: Chance of slowing a common monster (80-pt unlock)
Stat 4 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: Monster movement slows on boss wave; freeze visual after Winter's Kiss interaction

Description: The Winter's Kiss and Best Served Cold abilities will reduce the monsters' armor. Targets frozen by Winter's Kiss receive additional reduction of their armor. 80-pt bonus: Every time the opponent has one of their units frozen there is a chance of activating monster freezing and the damage against them from the Winter's Kiss.
Stat 4 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: Armor break visual on monsters; chain freeze on opponent units visible at 80+ pts

Description: After activating an ability there is some chance of obtaining a partial restoration of the Hero Ability but this effect will only be able to be activated again after a certain amount of time. (Cooldown: 60%; Chance of charging: 25%; Activation interval: 20s)
Observable Signatures: Passive recharge visual on hero portrait after ability use

Description: When the ability is activated throws a slug onto the path. The slug dissolves monsters (except bosses and mini bosses) and gives 3 flasks to the player. Merging absorbing or ranking up a unit expends one flask and summons a big jelly into the opponent's path. When the jelly is destroyed it provides mana in proportion to the wave number and splashes slime. When Mari's big summoned jellies are killed a slime charge increases the health of the monsters she summons. 80-pt bonus: On appearing a small monster has a chance to dissolve instantly and summon a small jelly to the enemy's field.
Observable Signatures: Slug projectile on path; jelly summoned to opponent field; flask counter visible

Description: Merging two units has a chance to create a slug unit on the player's field. Instead of merging normally this type of unit increases the rank of a unit it merges with. Can be used with units of maximum rank but the merge rank will not be increased. Each merging of the slug unit grants a slime charge. Slime charges also start increasing the damage dealt by the units on the field.
Stat 1 Name: Chance to spawn a slug unit
Observable Signatures: Slug unit appears on board after merge; slime charge counter increases

Description: When a boss mini boss or phantom appears covers them with slime linking them with nearby monsters. When the monster affected with slime dies links nearby monsters again. A portion of the damage received by a linked monster is transferred to the other linked monsters. Expending a flask or merging a slug unit links the frontmost unlinked monsters together. Linked monsters have their armor reduced.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Research Status: Slime link visual between monsters; damage transfer indicator; armor bar reduced on linked targets

Description: Phantoms and any monsters summoned to the opponent's field gain a slime shield that reduces the damage they receive (in PvP mode) or increases it (in other modes). 80-pt bonus: Monsters linked with the Unstable Connection ability receive increased critical damage.
Stat 3 Name: Critical damage bonus on linked monsters (80-pt unlock)
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Research Status: Slime shield visual on opponent-side monsters; critical hit numbers increased on linked targets at 80+ pts

Description: After activating an ability there is some chance of obtaining a partial restoration of the Hero Ability but this effect will only be able to be activated again after a certain amount of time. (Cooldown: 60%; Chance of charging: 25%; Activation interval: 20s)
Observable Signatures: Passive recharge visual on hero portrait after ability use

Description: Summons the power of the storm striking monsters with lightning and empowering the player's units. Monsters in the area take critical damage and units have their attack speed and damage increased also temporarily gaining a chance to call down lightning when attacking.
Observable Signatures: Lightning strike animation in area; unit attack speed visibly increases; lightning proc on unit attacks

Description: Charges several random tiles with Zeus' power. Units on charged tiles will receive a boost to their attack speed and damage. In addition during an attack a unit will have a chance of summoning a Lightning strike inflicting damage in the area around the first monster.
Observable Signatures: Zeus tile markers on board; lightning bolt proc from unit attacks; charged tile visual

Description: Units that receive a boost from an active ability or are standing on a charged tile will receive an increase in critical damage chance. There is also a passive increase to the chance of Zeus' critical strike. 80-pt bonus: All critical damage dealt by units in Zeus' tiles is increased.
Stat 3 Name: Critical damage bonus in tiles (80-pt unlock)
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Research Status: Critical hit numbers increased on charged tile units; Zeus portrait shows passive crit bonus

Description: Has a certain chance of increasing the merge rank of units on a charged tile. 80-pt bonus: The remaining ability cooldown time is reduced for each unit that has not had its rank increased while it is positioned in Zeus' tile as the ability is activated.
Stat 3 Name: Cooldown reduction per non-boosted unit (80-pt unlock)
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Research Status: Rank-up animation on units in charged tiles; ability meter refills faster at 80+ pts

Description: After activating an ability there is some chance of obtaining a partial restoration of the Hero Ability but this effect will only be able to be activated again after a certain amount of time. (Cooldown: 60%; Chance of charging: 25%; Activation interval: 20s)
Observable Signatures: Passive recharge visual on hero portrait after ability use

Description: Creates a Lich on the path. This Lich moves with the first monster and deals area damage. You can drag your unit onto the hero's portrait and thus turn it into a minion (up to 1 time every 5 sec). The minion's damage against monsters in a radius around the Lich is increased and the Lich's attack speed is equal to that of the minion. The Lich's attacks have a chance to kill a small monster instantly. When the ability is activated the Necromancer paralyzes random enemy units in PvP or stops the monster wave in Co-Op for 10 sec.
Observable Signatures: Lich unit visible on path moving with monsters; unit can be dragged to portrait for minion conversion; enemy units briefly paralyzed on cast

Description: When attacking a small monster the minion can now instantly kill it. When any unit is merged the Necromancer takes a soul increasing the damage dealt by the minion unit.
Stat 1 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: Minion unit visually glows when instant-kill procs; soul counter visible on hero; small monster disappears instantly on kill

Description: Increases the attack speed of the minion unit. Activating the Necromancer's ability also temporarily reduces the attack speed of enemy units. Repeated uses do not stack. In Co-Op increases the attack speed of allied units.
Observable Signatures: Enemy units visibly slowed on ability activation; minion attacks faster; curse duration is 10s

Description: When any units are merged the Necromancer has a chance to summon an Evil Spirit onto a random enemy unit. The Spirit will reduce the target's merge rank and return to raise the merge rank of the minion unit in PvP. In Co-Op increases the merge rank of an allied unit. Also increases the minion unit's critical chance. 80-pt bonus: The minion unit increases its critical damage.
Observable Signatures: Evil Spirit projectile animation toward enemy unit; enemy unit loses rank; minion unit rank increases; minion crit hits visible

Description: After activating an ability there is some chance of obtaining a partial restoration of the Hero Ability but this effect will only be able to be activated again after a certain amount of time. (Cooldown: 60%; Chance of charging: 25%; Activation interval: 20s)
Observable Signatures: Passive recharge visual on hero portrait after ability use

Description: The hero creates a portal upon the portrait. Dragging a unit onto the hero's portrait sacrifices that unit granting mana dependent on the summon cost and summoning a large monster to the enemy's side. Activating the ability ranks up a random unit and empowers the portal adding extra effects for the next sacrifice: large monsters summoned in proportion to rank; mana gained in proportion to rank; random units ranked up in proportion to rank. Every unit additionally increases damage for every neighboring unit in proportion to the number of neighbors.
Observable Signatures: Portal visual on hero portrait; large monster summoned to opponent field on sacrifice; unit rank-up animation on active

Description: Special tiles appear on the battlefield. Activating the ability has the priority of ranking up units in these tiles. For each rank of the sacrificed unit adds a charge that increases the damage dealt by units in these tiles. When sacrificing a unit has a chance to summon an extra monster refund the mana and add 3 charges.
Stat 4 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: Special sacrifice tile visual; charge counter on hero; damage numbers increase on tile units

Description: Every 4 ranks of the sacrificed units temporarily increase the critical damage dealt by units on the field. 80-pt bonus: Further increases the units' critical attack chance.
Stat 3 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Research Status: All units briefly glow on crit buff activation; critical hit numbers increase on field; crit chance increase visible at 80+ pts

Description: The ability refreshes for a certain percentage per each rank of the sacrificed unit. Upon attaining 50 charges units in special tiles gain attack speed increase. 80-pt bonus: When using enhanced sacrifice has a chance to rank up 2 extra units.
Stat 4 Description: Requires 80 total hero points invested to unlock this investment category.
Observable Signatures: Ability meter refills faster on sacrifice; attack speed visibly increases in special tiles at 50 charges; double rank-up visual at 80+ pts
